/* =================================================================
   BASE RESIZER STYLES
   Common styles for all resizer components
   ================================================================= */

/* Global resizer behavior */
.tc-resizer {
	touch-action: none;
	-webkit-touch-callout: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
	-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}

/* Ensure vertical resizers work on touch devices */
.tc-resizer[data-direction="vertical"] {
	touch-action: none !important;
	-ms-touch-action: none !important;
}

/* Resize overlay for capturing events during resize */
.tc-resize-overlay {
	position: fixed;
	top: 0;
	left: 0;
	right: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	width: 100%;
	height: 100%;
	z-index: 999999;
	background: transparent;
	cursor: inherit;
	display: none;
	touch-action: none;
}

body.tc-resizing .tc-resize-overlay {
	display: block;
	cursor: inherit;
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* Prevent interaction during resize */
body.tc-resizing {
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	-moz-user-select: none;
	-ms-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

body.tc-resizing * {
	pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* Allow pointer events on resizer elements even during resize for multi-touch support */
body.tc-resizing .tc-resizer {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* CRITICAL: Keep iframe editors interactive during resize */
body.tc-resizing .tc-edit-texteditor iframe {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* Ensure the editor wrapper remains interactive */
body.tc-resizing .tc-edit-texteditor {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* Also keep codemirror editors interactive if present */
body.tc-resizing .CodeMirror {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* Keep simple textareas interactive during resize */
body.tc-resizing .tc-edit-texteditor textarea {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* Disabled resizer state */
.tc-resizer-disabled {
	opacity: 0.3;
	cursor: not-allowed !important;
}

.tc-resizer-disabled:hover {
	background-color: <<colour muted-foreground>> !important;
	opacity: 0.3 !important;
}

/* =================================================================
   SIDEBAR RESIZER
   Styles for the main sidebar resizer
   ================================================================= */

/* Sidebar wrapper positioning */
@media (min-width: {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarbreakpoint}}) {
	.tc-sidebar-scrollable-wrapper {
		position: fixed;
		top: 0;
		right: 0;
		bottom: 0;
		left: {{{ [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fixed-fluid]then{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyright}] :else[[auto]] }}};
		width: {{{ [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fluid-fixed]then{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarwidth}] :else[[auto]] }}};
		max-width: calc(100vw - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyminwidth}} - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyleft}});
		z-index: 100;
	}

	<%if [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fluid-fixed]] %>

		.tc-sidebar-scrollable {
			max-width: calc(100vw - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyminwidth}} - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyleft}});
		}

		.tc-story-river {
			margin-right: clamp({{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarminwidth}},{{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarwidth}},calc(100vw - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyminwidth}} - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyleft}}));
		}

	<%elseif [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fixed-fluid]] %>

		.tc-sidebar-scrollable {
			max-width: calc(100vw - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyminwidth}} - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyleft}});
		}

		.tc-story-river {
			max-width: calc(100% - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarminwidth}} + {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storywidth}} - {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyright}} + {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/storyleft}});
		}

	<% endif %>
}

<%if [{$:/state/sidebar}match[no]] %>
.tc-sidebar-scrollable-wrapper {
	z-index: initial;
}
<% endif %>

/* Sidebar resizer bar */
.tc-sidebar-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	left: {{{ [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fluid-fixed]then[18px]] :else[[-24px]] }}};
	width: 6px;
	cursor: ew-resize;
	background-color: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	opacity: 0.75;
	transition: opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;
	z-index: 1;
}

.tc-sidebar-resizer:hover,
.tc-sidebar-resizer.tc-resizer-active {
	background-color: <<colour primary>>;
	opacity: 0.75;
}

/* Sidebar resizer grip indicator */
.tc-sidebar-resizer::before,
.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer::before {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: 50%;
	left: 50%;
	transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
	width: 3px;
	height: 40px;
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	border-radius: 1.5px;
	opacity: 1;
}

.tc-sidebar-resizer:hover::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer:hover::before,
.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

/* Hide sidebar resizer on mobile */
@media (max-width: {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarbreakpoint}}) {
	.tc-sidebar-resizer {
		display: none;
	}
}

@media (pointer: coarse) {
	.tc-sidebar-resizer {
		left: {{{ [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/options/sidebarlayout}match[fluid-fixed]then[6px]] :else[[-36px]] }}};
	}
}

/* =================================================================
   EDITOR RESIZER
   Styles for the tiddler editor preview pane resizer
   ================================================================= */

.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer {
	grid-area: resizer;
	width: 5px;
	cursor: ew-resize;
	background-color: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	opacity: 0.75;
	transition: opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;
	margin: 4px 0 3px 0;
	position: relative;
}

.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer:hover,
.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer.tc-resizer-active {
	background-color: <<colour primary>>;
	opacity: 1;
}

.tc-tiddler-frame .tc-tiddler-editor.tc-tiddler-preview .tc-tiddler-preview-preview {
	margin-left: 0;
}

@media (pointer: coarse) {
	.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer {
		width: 15px;
	}
}

/* =================================================================
   PANEL LAYOUTS
   Base styles for various panel layout components
   ================================================================= */

/* Base panel containers */
.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
.tc-vertical-split-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels,
.tc-three-row-panels,
.tc-master-detail-layout,
.tc-collapsible-master-detail {
	position: relative;
	display: flex;
	width: 100%;
	height: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels {
	flex-direction: row;
}

.tc-vertical-split-panel,
.tc-three-row-panels {
	flex-direction: column;
}

/* Panel flex behavior */
.tc-panel-left,
.tc-panel-top,
.tc-master-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels > .tc-panel-right {
	flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tc-panel-right:not(.tc-three-column-panels > .tc-panel-right),
.tc-panel-bottom:not(.tc-three-row-panels > .tc-panel-bottom),
.tc-panel-center,
.tc-panel-center-vertical,
.tc-detail-panel {
	flex: 1;
}

/* Ensure center-vertical panel fills remaining height */
.tc-panel-center-vertical {
	height: 100%;
	overflow: auto;
}

/* Ensure text wrapping in panels */
.tc-panel-left,
.tc-panel-right,
.tc-panel-top,
.tc-panel-bottom,
.tc-panel-center,
.tc-master-panel,
.tc-detail-panel {
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

/* =================================================================
   PANEL SPLITTERS
   Resizer bars between panels
   ================================================================= */

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
	flex-shrink: 0;
	position: relative;
	background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	transition: background 0.2s ease;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical {
	width: 5px;
	cursor: ew-resize;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
	height: 5px;
	cursor: ns-resize;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical:hover,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal:hover,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical.tc-resizer-active,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal.tc-resizer-active {
	background: <<colour primary>>;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical.tc-resizer-active,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal.tc-resizer-active {
	opacity: 0.8;
}

/* Splitter grip indicators */
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal::before {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: 50%;
	left: 50%;
	transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical::before {
	width: 3px;
	height: 40px;
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	border-radius: 1.5px;
	opacity: 1;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal::before {
	width: 40px;
	height: 3px;
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	border-radius: 1.5px;
	opacity: 1;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical.tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal.tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

/* =================================================================
   MASTER-DETAIL LAYOUTS
   Specific styles for master-detail panel arrangements
   ================================================================= */

.tc-master-detail-layout .tc-master-panel {
	background: <<colour tiddler-background>>;
	border-right: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-border>>;
}

.tc-master-detail-layout.tc-vertical-split-panel .tc-master-panel {
	border-right: none;
	border-bottom: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-border>>;
}

/* Collapsible master-detail */
.tc-collapsible-master-detail {
	position: relative;
}

.tc-collapsible-master-detail .tc-master-panel {
	position: relative;
}

.tc-collapsible-master-detail .tc-master-panel {
	transition: margin-left 0.3s ease;
}

.tc-collapsible-three-column-panels .tc-panel-left {
	transition: margin-left 0.3s ease;
}

.tc-collapsible-three-column-panels .tc-panel-right {
	transition: margin-right 0.3s ease;
}

.tc-collapsible-three-row-panels .tc-panel-top {
	transition: margin-top 0.3s ease;
}

.tc-collapsible-three-row-panels .tc-panel-bottom {
	transition: margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
}

.tc-collapsible-master-detail .tc-master-panel.tc-collapsed {
	flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* Collapse/expand buttons */
.tc-panel-collapse-btn,
.tc-panel-expand-btn {
	position: absolute;
	top: 10px;
	left: 10px;
	padding: 5px;
	border: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-border>>;
	border-radius: 3px;
	z-index: 1;
}

.tc-panel-collapse-btn.tc-panel-btn-right,
.tc-panel-expand-btn.tc-panel-btn-right {
	left: auto;
	right: 10px;
}

.tc-panel-collapse-btn.tc-panel-btn-top,
.tc-panel-expand-btn.tc-panel-btn-top,
.tc-panel-collapse-btn.tc-panel-btn-bottom,
.tc-panel-expand-btn.tc-panel-btn-bottom {
	transform: rotate(90deg);
}

.tc-panel-collapse-btn.tc-panel-btn-bottom,
.tc-panel-expand-btn.tc-panel-btn-bottom {
	top: auto;
	bottom: 10px;
}

/* =================================================================
   HANDLE STYLE VARIATIONS
   Different visual styles for resizer handles
   ================================================================= */

/* Dots pattern */
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer)::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="dots"]::before {
	width: 5px;
	height: 5px;
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	box-shadow: 0 10px 0 <<colour primary>>, 0 20px 0 <<colour primary>>, 0 -10px 0 <<colour primary>>, 0 -20px 0 <<colour primary>>;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="dots"]::before {
	width: 5px;
	height: 5px;
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	box-shadow: 10px 0 0 <<colour primary>>, 20px 0 0 <<colour primary>>, -10px 0 0 <<colour primary>>, -20px 0 0 <<colour primary>>;
}

/* Lines pattern */
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer)::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="lines"]::before {
	width: 1px;
	height: 40px;
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
		to bottom,
		<<colour primary>> 0,
		<<colour primary>> 3px,
		transparent 3px,
		transparent 6px
	);
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="lines"]::before {
	width: 40px;
	height: 1px;
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
		to right,
		<<colour primary>> 0,
		<<colour primary>> 3px,
		transparent 3px,
		transparent 6px
	);
}

/* Chevron pattern */
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer)::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before {
	content: "❯";
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	background: none;
	font-size: 12px;
	color: <<colour primary>>;
	letter-spacing: -3px;
	font-weight: bold;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before {
	content: "⌄";
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	background: none;
	font-size: 12px;
	color: <<colour primary>>;
	letter-spacing: -3px;
	font-weight: bold;
}

/* Grip pattern (dots grid) */
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer)::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="grip"]::before {
	content: "⋮";
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	background: none;
	font-size: 14px;
	color: <<colour primary>>;
	letter-spacing: -2px;
	line-height: 1;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="grip"]::before {
	content: "⋯⋯";
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	background: none;
	font-size: 14px;
	color: <<colour primary>>;
	letter-spacing: -2px;
	line-height: 1;
}

/* Hover states for all handle styles */
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer):hover::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer).tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before {
	color: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer):hover::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="dots"]:hover::before,
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer).tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"].tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="dots"].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	box-shadow: 0 10px 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, 0 20px 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, 0 -10px 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, 0 -20px 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="dots"]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="dots"].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	box-shadow: 10px 0 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, 20px 0 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, -10px 0 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>, -20px 0 0 <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer):hover::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="lines"]:hover::before,
.tc-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer).tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"].tc-resizer-active::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical[data-handle-style="lines"].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
		to bottom,
		<<colour muted-foreground>> 0,
		<<colour muted-foreground>> 3px,
		transparent 3px,
		transparent 6px
	);
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="lines"]:hover::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal[data-handle-style="lines"].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
		to right,
		<<colour muted-foreground>> 0,
		<<colour muted-foreground>> 3px,
		transparent 3px,
		transparent 6px
	);
}

/* Double-click visual feedback */
@keyframes resizer-reset-pulse {
	0% { opacity: 1; }
	50% { opacity: 0.3; }
	100% { opacity: 1; }
}

.tc-resizer:active {
	animation: resizer-reset-pulse 0.2s ease-out;
}

/* =================================================================
   TOUCH DEVICE ENHANCEMENTS
   Improved usability for mobile and touch interfaces
   ================================================================= */

@media (pointer: coarse) {
	/* Add gaps between panels for easier touch */
	.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
	.tc-three-column-panels,
	.tc-collapsible-master-detail {
		gap: 10px;
	}
	
	.tc-vertical-split-panel {
		gap: 10px;
		/* Prevent vertical scroll interference on touch */
		/*touch-action: pan-x pinch-zoom;*/
	}
	
	/* Center resizers in gap space */
	.tc-horizontal-split-panel .tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
	.tc-three-column-panels .tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
	.tc-collapsible-master-detail .tc-panel-splitter-vertical {
		margin-left: -10px;
		margin-right: -10px;
	}
	
	.tc-vertical-split-panel .tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
		margin-top: -10px;
		margin-bottom: -10px;
		/* Ensure touch target is properly positioned */
		position: relative;
		z-index: 10;
	}
	
	/* Enhanced splitters for touch */
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
		opacity: 0.3;
	}
	
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical {
		width: 20px;
		flex-shrink: 0;
	}
	
	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
		height: 20px;
		flex-shrink: 0;
	}
	
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical::before {
		width: 3px;
		height: 40px;
		background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
		border-radius: 1.5px;
		opacity: 1;
	}
	
	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal::before {
		width: 40px;
		height: 3px;
		background: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
		border-radius: 1.5px;
		opacity: 1;
	}
	
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical:hover,
	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal:hover,
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical.tc-resizer-active,
	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal.tc-resizer-active {
		opacity: 1;
	}
	
	/* Enhanced touch targets for all resizers */
	.tc-resizer:not(.tc-sidebar-resizer):not(.tc-flexbox-story-column-resizer-flexbox) {
		position: relative;
	}
	
	.tc-resizer[data-direction="horizontal"]:not(.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer):not(.tc-flexbox-story-column-resizer-flexbox) {
		min-width: 20px;
	}
	
	.tc-resizer[data-direction="vertical"]:not(.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer) {
		min-height: 20px;
	}
	
	/* Editor resizer enhancement for touch */
	.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer {
		width: 15px;
		opacity: 0.3;
		padding: 0 5px;
	}
	
	/*.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer::after {
		content: "⋮";
		position: absolute;
		top: 50%;
		left: 50%;
		transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
		font-size: 12px;
		color: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
		opacity: 0.7;
	}*/
	
	/* Active state for touch */
	.tc-resizer.tc-resizer-active:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer) {
		opacity: 1 !important;
		background-color: <<colour primary>>;
	}
	
	.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer.tc-resizer-active::after {
		color: <<colour background>>;
		opacity: 1;
	}
}

/* =================================================================
   RESIZABLE TABLE
   Styles for resizable table components
   ================================================================= */

.tc-resizable-table {
	table-layout: fixed;
	border-collapse: collapse;
	width: 100%;
}

.tc-resizable-table th,
.tc-resizable-table td {
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: break-word;
	word-break: break-word;
	white-space: normal;
	overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-resizable-table-cell {
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: break-word;
	word-break: break-word;
	white-space: normal;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	right: -4px;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	width: 8px;
	cursor: col-resize;
	z-index: 10;
	background-color: <<colour table-border>>;
	opacity: 0.25;
}

/* =================================================================
   RESIZABLE TABLE FLEXBOX
   Styles for flexbox-based resizable table
   ================================================================= */

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-wrapper {
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: column;
	width: 100%;
	border: 1px solid <<colour table-border>>;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-header {
	border-bottom: 2px solid <<colour table-border>>;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-header > div:not(:last-child) {
	border-right: 1px solid <<colour table-border>>;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row {
	border-bottom: 1px solid <<colour table-border>>;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row:last-child {
	border-bottom: none;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row > div:not(:last-child) {
	border-right: 1px solid <<colour table-border>>;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox {
	position: absolute;
	right: -4px;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	width: 8px;
	cursor: col-resize;
	z-index: 100;
	background: transparent;
}

.tc-width-100 {
	width: 100%;
}

/* =================================================================
   RESIZER CSS STABILITY OVERHAUL
   Appended intentionally after the original rules so it preserves the
   existing feature set while overriding fragile layout behaviour.
   ================================================================= */

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Global containment and resize safety
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-resizer,
.tc-resizer::before,
.tc-resizer::after,
.tc-sidebar-resizer,
.tc-sidebar-resizer::before,
.tc-sidebar-resizer::after,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-vertical::after,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal::before,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal::after,
.tc-table-column-resizer,
.tc-table-column-resizer::before,
.tc-table-column-resizer::after,
.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox,
.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox::before,
.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox::after {
	box-sizing: border-box;
	touch-action: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

body.tc-resizing {
	cursor: inherit;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

body.tc-resizing .tc-resizer,
body.tc-resizing .tc-resize-overlay {
	pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Sidebar wrapper and scroll containment
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

@media (min-width: {{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarbreakpoint}}) {
	.tc-sidebar-scrollable-wrapper {
		box-sizing: border-box;
		min-width: 0;
		min-height: 0;
		overflow: visible;
	}

	.tc-sidebar-scrollable-wrapper > .tc-sidebar-scrollable {
		box-sizing: border-box;
		min-width: 0;
		min-height: 0;
		overflow-x: auto;
		overflow-y: auto;
		-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
	}
}

.tc-sidebar-scrollable,
.tc-sidebar-header,
.tc-sidebar-lists,
.tc-sidebar-tabs,
.tc-sidebar-search,
.tc-tab-set,
.tc-tab-buttons,
.tc-tab-content {
	min-width: 0;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

.tc-sidebar-lists:not(.tc-sidebar-search) {
	overflow-x: auto;
}

.tc-sidebar-lists .tc-menu-list-item {
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Sidebar resizer robustness
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-sidebar-resizer {
	box-sizing: border-box;
	flex: 0 0 auto;
	min-width: 6px;
	touch-action: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

@media (pointer: coarse) {
	.tc-sidebar-resizer {
		min-width: 18px;
	}
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Editor resizer robustness
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-tiddler-editor-resizer {
	box-sizing: border-box;
	flex: 0 0 auto;
	min-width: 5px;
	touch-action: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Panel layout stability
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
.tc-vertical-split-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels,
.tc-three-row-panels,
.tc-master-detail-layout,
.tc-collapsible-master-detail,
.tc-collapsible-three-column-panels,
.tc-collapsible-three-row-panels {
	position: relative;
	display: flex;
	width: 100%;
	height: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	max-height: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	contain: layout;
}

.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels,
.tc-collapsible-master-detail,
.tc-collapsible-three-column-panels {
	flex-direction: row;
}

.tc-vertical-split-panel,
.tc-three-row-panels,
.tc-collapsible-three-row-panels {
	flex-direction: column;
}

.tc-panel-left,
.tc-panel-right,
.tc-panel-top,
.tc-panel-bottom,
.tc-panel-center,
.tc-panel-center-vertical,
.tc-master-panel,
.tc-detail-panel {
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	max-height: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;
	-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

.tc-panel-left,
.tc-panel-right,
.tc-panel-top,
.tc-panel-bottom,
.tc-master-panel {
	flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.tc-panel-center,
.tc-panel-center-vertical,
.tc-detail-panel {
	flex: 1 1 auto;
}

.tc-panel-left > *,
.tc-panel-right > *,
.tc-panel-top > *,
.tc-panel-bottom > *,
.tc-panel-center > *,
.tc-panel-center-vertical > *,
.tc-master-panel > *,
.tc-detail-panel > * {
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Collapsed panels should not rely on negative margins. */
.tc-collapsed,
.tc-master-panel.tc-collapsed,
.tc-panel-left.tc-collapsed,
.tc-panel-right.tc-collapsed,
.tc-panel-top.tc-collapsed,
.tc-panel-bottom.tc-collapsed {
	flex-basis: 0 !important;
	width: 0 !important;
	height: 0 !important;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	padding: 0 !important;
	border-width: 0 !important;
	overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Panel splitter robustness
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical,
.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
	position: relative;
	flex: 0 0 auto;
	z-index: 20;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	touch-action: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
	background-clip: padding-box;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-vertical {
	width: 5px;
	min-width: 5px;
	max-width: 5px;
	cursor: ew-resize;
}

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
	height: 5px;
	min-height: 5px;
	max-height: 5px;
	cursor: ns-resize;
}

@media (pointer: coarse) {
	.tc-panel-splitter-vertical {
		width: 20px;
		min-width: 20px;
		max-width: 20px;
	}

	.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {
		height: 20px;
		min-height: 20px;
		max-height: 20px;
	}
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   RESIZABLE TABLE: robust vertical expansion
   -----------------------------------------------------------------

   The important correction is that table cells must be allowed to grow
   vertically with their content. Horizontal width remains controlled by
   the resizer and table-layout: fixed, but vertical overflow must not be
   clipped at the cell level.
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-resizable-table-wrapper {
	width: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;
	-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

.tc-resizable-table {
	table-layout: fixed;
	border-collapse: collapse;
	width: 100%;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

.tc-resizable-table caption {
	box-sizing: border-box;
	max-width: 100%;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.tc-resizable-table thead,
.tc-resizable-table tbody,
.tc-resizable-table tfoot,
.tc-resizable-table tr {
	height: auto;
	min-height: 0;
	max-height: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

.tc-resizable-table th,
.tc-resizable-table td {
	position: relative;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 0;
	max-height: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	vertical-align: top;
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
	word-break: normal;
	white-space: normal;
	overflow: visible;
}

/* Make the inner cell box participate in normal height calculation. */
.tc-resizable-table-cell {
	display: block;
	position: relative;
	width: 100%;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 100%;
	max-height: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: visible;
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
	word-break: normal;
	white-space: normal;
}

/* Common content in table cells must wrap and therefore increase row height. */
.tc-resizable-table-cell p,
.tc-resizable-table-cell div,
.tc-resizable-table-cell span,
.tc-resizable-table-cell a,
.tc-resizable-table-cell li {
	max-width: 100%;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
	word-break: normal;
}

.tc-resizable-table-cell pre,
.tc-resizable-table-cell code {
	max-width: 100%;
	white-space: pre-wrap;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
	word-break: break-word;
}

.tc-resizable-table-cell img,
.tc-resizable-table-cell svg,
.tc-resizable-table-cell canvas,
.tc-resizable-table-cell video,
.tc-resizable-table-cell iframe,
.tc-resizable-table-cell embed {
	max-width: 100%;
	height: auto;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Nested tables should not blow up the parent table. */
.tc-resizable-table-cell table {
	display: block;
	max-width: 100%;
	overflow-x: auto;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Column handles must overlay the full expanded cell height. */
.tc-table-column-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	right: -4px;
	bottom: 0;
	width: 8px;
	min-width: 8px;
	z-index: 30;
	cursor: col-resize;
	touch-action: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Make the handle visible and usable without forcing table dimensions. */
.tc-table-column-resizer::before {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	left: 50%;
	width: 2px;
	transform: translateX(-50%);
	background: <<colour table-border>>;
	opacity: 0.45;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer:hover::before,
.tc-table-column-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: <<colour primary>>;
	opacity: 1;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   RESIZABLE TABLE FLEXBOX: robust row height expansion
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-wrapper {
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: column;
	width: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-header,
.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row {
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: row;
	align-items: stretch;
	width: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 0;
	box-sizing: border-box;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-header > div,
.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row > div {
	position: relative;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	height: auto;
	max-height: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: visible;
	word-wrap: break-word;
	overflow-wrap: anywhere;
	word-break: normal;
	white-space: normal;
}

/* The body scrolls, but rows and cells may grow vertically. */
.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-body {
	flex: 1 1 auto;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;
	-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

.tc-resizable-table-flexbox-body > .tc-resizable-table-flexbox-row {
	flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox {
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	right: -4px;
	bottom: 0;
	width: 8px;
	min-width: 8px;
	z-index: 100;
	cursor: col-resize;
	touch-action: none;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	background: transparent;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox::before {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	left: 50%;
	width: 2px;
	transform: translateX(-50%);
	background: <<colour table-border>>;
	opacity: 0.35;
}

.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox:hover::before,
.tc-table-column-resizer-flexbox.tc-resizer-active::before {

.tc-panel-left select,
.tc-panel-right select,
.tc-panel-top select,

}

.tc-horizontal-split-panel,
.tc-three-column-panels,

	min-height: 0;

	overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-vertical-split-panel,
.tc-three-row-panels,
.tc-collapsible-three-row-panels {
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: column;
	width: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: hidden;
}

.tc-panel-left,
.tc-panel-right,
.tc-panel-top,
.tc-panel-bottom,
.tc-master-panel {

.tc-panel-splitter-horizontal {

}

.tc-collapsed {

	height: 0 !important;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	padding: 0 !important;
	border-width: 0 !important;
	overflow: hidden !important;
}

.btc-resizer-demo-box {

.btc-resizer-horizontal-split,

}

}

.btc-resizer-pane {

}

.btc-resizer-flex-pane {

	min-width: 0;

	overflow: auto;
}

.btc-resizer-fill-pane {

	min-height: 0;

}

.btc-resizer-handle {

}

.btc-resizer-handle[data-direction="horizontal"],

}

.btc-resizer-handle[data-direction="vertical"],

.btc-resizer-handle:hover,

.btc-resizer-sidebar-shell {

}

.btc-resizer-main {

.btc-resizer-table {

.btc-resizer-table th,

.btc-resizer-table th {

}

.btc-resizer-table-col-handle {

.btc-resizer-preset-card {

.btc-resizer-cssvar-demo {
	width: var(--btc-cssvar-panel-width, 22rem);

	padding: 1em;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;

/* =================================================================
   BTC RGRID TABLES
   CSS Grid based resizable table system.

   This block replaces the older duplicated RGrid rules and keeps:
   - normal RGrid cell rendering
   - ghost cells
   - legacy in-cell column handles
   - legacy in-cell row handles
   - fixed-height / row-resizable tables
   - global boundary overlay handles
   - per-cell overlay handles
   - debug labels
   ================================================================= */

.btc-rgrid-table {
	--btc-rgrid-col-min-width: 0;
	--btc-rgrid-columns-template: repeat(4, minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-col-min-width, 0), 1fr));
	--btc-rgrid-rows-template: repeat(4, minmax(3rem, auto));
	--btc-rgrid-gap: 0px;
	--btc-rgrid-cell-gap: 0.35rem;
	--btc-rgrid-cell-padding: 0.75em 0.95em;
	--btc-rgrid-row-min-height: 3rem;
	--btc-rgrid-border: <<colour border>>;
	--btc-rgrid-background: <<colour background>>;
	--btc-rgrid-header-background: <<colour very-muted-foreground>>;
	--btc-rgrid-footer-background: <<colour very-muted-foreground>>;
	--btc-rgrid-muted-background: <<colour very-muted-foreground>>;
	--btc-rgrid-ghost-background: transparent;
	--btc-rgrid-handle-size: 16px;
	--btc-rgrid-handle-line: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
	--btc-rgrid-handle-active: <<colour foreground>>;

	position: relative;
	width: 100%;
	max-width: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: visible;
	border: 1px solid var(--btc-rgrid-border);
	border-radius: 8px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-background);
}

.btc-rgrid-content {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 1;
	isolation: isolate;

	display: grid;
	grid-template-columns: var(--btc-rgrid-columns-template);
	grid-template-rows: var(--btc-rgrid-rows-template);
	grid-auto-rows: minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-row-min-height), auto);
	gap: 0;

	width: 100%;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	padding: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	overflow: visible;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Fixed-height / row-resizable grid mode
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-table[data-resize-rows="yes"] {
	height: var(--btc-rgrid-height, 32rem);
	min-height: 0;
	max-height: var(--btc-rgrid-height, 32rem);
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: column;
	overflow: auto;
}

.btc-rgrid-table[data-resize-rows="yes"] > .btc-rgrid-content,
.btc-rgrid-table[data-resize-rows="yes"] .btc-rgrid-content {
	flex: 1 1 auto;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 100%;
	max-height: none;

	display: grid;
	grid-template-columns: var(--btc-rgrid-columns-template);
	grid-template-rows: var(--btc-rgrid-rows-template);
	grid-auto-rows: minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-row-min-height), auto);

	align-content: stretch;
	align-items: stretch;
}

.btc-rgrid-table[data-resize-rows="yes"] .btc-rgrid-cell {
	height: 100%;
	min-height: 0;
}

.btc-rgrid-table[data-resize-rows="yes"] .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	height: 100%;
	min-height: 0;
	max-height: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Cells
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-cell {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 1;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	padding: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	border: none;
	background: transparent;
	overflow: visible;
}

/*
	The visual cell box.

	The wrapper owns the exact grid placement. The visible spacing between
	cells comes from the wrapper padding instead of CSS grid gap. That keeps
	resize-handle positioning stable.
*/
.btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 1;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	height: 100%;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	overflow: auto;

	border: 1px solid var(--btc-rgrid-border);
	border-radius: 4px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-background);
	padding: var(--btc-rgrid-cell-padding, 0.75em 0.95em);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-real {
	z-index: 3;
	background: transparent;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost {
	z-index: 2;
	pointer-events: auto;
	background: transparent;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost > .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-ghost-background);
	border-style: dashed;
	opacity: 0.28;
	padding: 0;
	pointer-events: none;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-header > .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	font-weight: bold;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-header-background);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-footer > .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	font-weight: bold;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-footer-background);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-muted > .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-muted-background);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-center > .btc-rgrid-cell-content {
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
	justify-content: center;
	text-align: center;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-title {
	font-weight: bold;
	margin-bottom: 0.35em;
	font-size: 0.9em;
	opacity: 0.8;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Legacy in-cell column handles
   -----------------------------------------------------------------

   Kept for compatibility with older procedures. Newer placed/xy procedures
   can use overlay handles instead.
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	z-index: 30;
	top: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	right: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	left: auto;

	width: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size);
	height: auto;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	margin: 0;
	padding: 0;

	cursor: ew-resize;
	background: transparent !important;
	touch-action: none;
	user-select: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
	animation: none;
	pointer-events: auto;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;
	top: 12% !important;
	right: auto !important;
	bottom: 12% !important;
	left: 50% !important;

	width: 1px !important;
	height: auto !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-height: none !important;

	transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
	border-radius: 999px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-line) !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;

	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;

	opacity: 0.38;
	transition:
		opacity 120ms ease,
		background-color 120ms ease;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer::after {
	content: none !important;
	display: none !important;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;
	top: 12% !important;
	right: auto !important;
	bottom: 12% !important;
	left: 50% !important;

	width: 1px !important;
	height: auto !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-height: none !important;

	transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
	border-radius: 999px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-line) !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;

	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;

	opacity: 0.38;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::after {
	content: none !important;
	display: none !important;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-active) !important;
	opacity: 0.85;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer::before {
	opacity: 0.55;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	opacity: 0.85;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Legacy in-cell row handles
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	z-index: 31;
	left: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);

	top: auto;
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;

	right: 12% !important;

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::after {

}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;
	left: 12% !important;
	right: 12% !important;
	top: 50% !important;
	bottom: auto !important;

	width: auto !important;
	height: 1px !important;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	max-width: none !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-height: none !important;

	transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
	border-radius: 999px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-line) !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;

	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;

	opacity: 0.38;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style]:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer[data-handle-style].tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-active) !important;
	opacity: 0.85;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer::before {
	opacity: 0.55;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-cell:hover > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	opacity: 0.85;
}

/*
	If both legacy column and row handles exist in the same cell, shorten
	each hit area near the bottom-right corner so they do not fully cover
	each other.
*/
.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer {
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2 + var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / 2);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer {
	right: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2 + var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / 2);
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-real > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer,
.btc-rgrid-cell-real > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer,
.btc-rgrid-cell-real > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer {
	z-index: 65;
}

.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-cell-resizer,
.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-resizer,
.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-resizer {
	z-index: 45;
	pointer-events: auto;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Overlay handles
   -----------------------------------------------------------------

   Supports both models:
   - global boundary overlay slots:
       .btc-rgrid-column-overlay-slot / .btc-rgrid-row-overlay-slot
   - per-cell overlay slots:
       .btc-rgrid-cell-column-overlay-slot / .btc-rgrid-cell-row-overlay-slot

   Overlay slots are grid items above normal cells. Only the actual resizer
   receives pointer events.
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 1000;
	min-width: 0;
	min-height: 0;
	pointer-events: none;
	overflow: visible;
}

/* Global boundary column slot: zero-width slot at the right edge of a column. */
.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-slot {
	align-self: stretch;
	justify-self: end;
	width: 0;
}

/* Global boundary row slot: zero-height slot at the bottom edge of a row. */
.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-slot {
	justify-self: stretch;
	align-self: end;
	height: 0;
}

/* Per-cell overlay slots span the exact grid area of their owner cell. */
.btc-rgrid-cell-column-overlay-slot,
.btc-rgrid-cell-row-overlay-slot {
	align-self: stretch;
	justify-self: stretch;
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
}

/* Base overlay resizer */
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer {
	position: absolute;
	z-index: 1001;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-width: none !important;
	max-height: none !important;
	margin: 0;
	padding: 0;
	background: transparent !important;
	pointer-events: auto;
	touch-action: none;
	user-select: none;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
	animation: none;
}

/* Global boundary column handle: centered on boundary. */
.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-resizer {
	top: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	left: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);
	right: auto;
	width: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size);
	height: auto;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	cursor: ew-resize;
}

/* Per-cell column handle: right edge of the owning cell/span. */
.btc-rgrid-cell-column-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-resizer {
	top: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	right: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	left: auto;
	width: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size);
	height: auto;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	cursor: ew-resize;
}

/* Global boundary row handle: centered on boundary. */
.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-resizer {
	left: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	right: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	top: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);
	bottom: auto;
	width: auto;
	height: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size);
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	cursor: ns-resize;
}

/* Per-cell row handle: bottom edge of the owning cell/span. */
.btc-rgrid-cell-row-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-resizer {
	left: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	right: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-cell-gap) / 2);
	top: auto;
	bottom: calc(var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size) / -2);
	width: auto;
	height: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-size);
	min-width: 0 !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	cursor: ns-resize;
}

/* Overlay column visible line */
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-resizer::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;
	top: 12% !important;
	right: auto !important;
	bottom: 12% !important;
	left: 50% !important;

	width: 1px !important;
	height: auto !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-height: none !important;

	transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
	border-radius: 999px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-line) !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;

	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;

	opacity: 0.38;
	transition:
		opacity 120ms ease,
		background-color 120ms ease;
}

/* Overlay row visible line */
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-resizer::before {
	content: "" !important;
	position: absolute !important;
	left: 12% !important;
	right: 12% !important;
	top: 50% !important;
	bottom: auto !important;

	width: auto !important;
	height: 1px !important;
	min-width: 0 !important;
	max-width: none !important;
	min-height: 0 !important;
	max-height: none !important;

	transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
	border-radius: 999px;
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-line) !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;

	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;

	opacity: 0.38;
	transition:
		opacity 120ms ease,
		background-color 120ms ease;
}

/* Kill generic handle-style decorations for overlay handles. */
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer::after,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style]::after,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::after,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::after {
	content: none !important;
	display: none !important;
}

.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style]::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="grip"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="dots"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="lines"]::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-overlay-resizer[data-handle-style="chevron"]::before {
	color: inherit !important;
	font-size: inherit !important;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	letter-spacing: normal !important;
	line-height: normal !important;
	text-indent: 0 !important;
	white-space: normal !important;
	box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* Overlay hover/active state */
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-column-overlay-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-active) !important;
	opacity: 0.85;
}

.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-resizer:hover::before,
.btc-rgrid-overlay-slot > .tc-resizer.btc-rgrid-row-overlay-resizer.tc-resizer-active::before {
	background: var(--btc-rgrid-handle-active) !important;
	opacity: 0.85;
}

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Debug labels
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

.btc-rgrid-debug .btc-rgrid-cell[data-col-span]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost)::after {
	content: "c" attr(data-col) "/" attr(data-col-span) " r" attr(data-row) "/" attr(data-row-span);
	position: absolute;
	right: 1.1em;
	bottom: 0.15em;
	font-size: 0.7em;
	opacity: 0.45;
	pointer-events: none;
}

.btc-rgrid-debug .btc-rgrid-cell[data-colspan]:not(.btc-rgrid-cell-ghost)::after {
	content: attr(data-title) " c" attr(data-col) "/" attr(data-colspan) " r" attr(data-row) "/" attr(data-rowspan);
	position: absolute;
	right: 0.75em;
	bottom: 0.35em;
	font-size: 0.7em;
	opacity: 0.45;
	pointer-events: none;
}

.btc-rgrid-debug .btc-rgrid-cell-ghost::after {
	content: "ghost c" attr(data-col) " r" attr(data-row);
	position: absolute;
	right: 0.75em;
	bottom: 0.35em;
	font-size: 0.65em;
	opacity: 0.25;
	pointer-events: none;
}

.btc-rgrid-debug .btc-rgrid-overlay-slot[data-grid-track-axis][data-grid-track-index]::after {
	content: attr(data-grid-track-axis) " " attr(data-grid-track-index);
	position: absolute;
	left: 0.35em;
	top: 0.2em;
	font-size: 0.6em;
	opacity: 0.18;
	pointer-events: none;
}

"},"$:/plugins/BTC/resizer/ui/EditTemplate/body/default":{"title":"$:/plugins/BTC/resizer/ui/EditTemplate/body/default","code-body":"yes","text":"\function edit-preview-state()
[{$:/config/ShowEditPreview/PerTiddler}!match[yes]then[$:/state/showeditpreview]] :else[<qualified-preview-state>] +[get[text]] :else[[no]]
\end

\define config-visibility-title()
$:/config/EditorToolbarButtons/Visibility/$(currentTiddler)$
\end

\define importFileActions()
<$action-popup $state=<<importState>> $coords="(0,0,0,0)" $floating="yes"/>
\end

\whitespace trim
<$let
	qualified-preview-state=<<qualify "$:/state/showeditpreview">>
	editPreviewStateTiddler={{{ [{$:/config/ShowEditPreview/PerTiddler}!match[yes]then[$:/state/showeditpreview]] :else[<qualified-preview-state>] }}}
	importTitle=<<qualify $:/ImportImage>>
	importState=<<qualify $:/state/ImportImage>>
	handleWidth={{{ [{$:/info/resizer-mediaquery/pointer-coarse}match[yes]then[15px]] :else[[5px]] }}} >
<$dropzone importTitle=<<importTitle>> autoOpenOnImport="no" contentTypesFilter={{$:/config/Editor/ImportContentTypesFilter}} class="tc-dropzone-editor" enable={{{ [{$:/config/DragAndDrop/Enable}match[no]] :else[subfilter{$:/config/Editor/EnableImportFilter}then[yes]else[no]] }}} filesOnly="yes" actions=<<importFileActions>> >
<div>
<div class={{{ [<edit-preview-state>match[yes]then[tc-tiddler-preview]else[tc-tiddler-preview-hidden]] [[tc-tiddler-editor]] +[join[ ]] }}} style.grid-template-areas={{{ [<edit-preview-state>match[yes]then["toolbar toolbar toolbar" "editor resizer preview"]else["toolbar toolbar toolbar" "editor editor editor"]] }}} style.grid-template-columns={{{ [<edit-preview-state>match[yes]then<editPreviewStateTiddler>has[width]get[width]addsuffix[ ]addsuffix<handleWidth>addsuffix[ 1fr]] :else[<edit-preview-state>match[yes]then<editPreviewStateTiddler>!has[width]then[50% ]addsuffix<handleWidth>addsuffix[ 1fr]] :else[<edit-preview-state>!match[yes]then[1fr]] }}}>

<$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/EditTemplate/body/editor" mode="inline"/>

<$list filter="[<editPreviewStateTiddler>get[text]match[yes]]" variable="ignore">

<$resizer
	class="tc-tiddler-editor-resizer"
	direction="horizontal"
	tiddler=<<editPreviewStateTiddler>>
	field="width"
	min="20%"
	max="80%"
	default="50%"
	unit="%"
	smoothReset="yes"
	handleStyle="solid"
/>

<div class="tc-tiddler-preview-preview" data-tiddler-title={{!!draft.title}} data-tags={{!!tags}}>

<$transclude tiddler={{$:/state/editpreviewtype}} mode="inline">

<$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/EditTemplate/body/preview/output" mode="inline"/>

</$transclude>

</div>

</$list>

</div>

</div>

</$dropzone>

</$let>
"},"$:/plugins/BTC/resizer/procedures/panels":{"title":"$:/plugins/BTC/resizer/procedures/panels","tags":"$:/tags/Global","code-body":"yes","text":"\whitespace trim

\function tf.get.value.metric(value)
[<value>suffix[px]then[px]]
:else[<value>suffix[%]then[%]]
:else[<value>suffix[rem]then[rem]]
:else[<value>suffix[em]then[em]]
:else[<value>suffix[vh]then[vh]]
:else[<value>suffix[vw]then[vw]]
:else[<value>suffix[vmin]then[vmin]]
:else[<value>suffix[vmax]then[vmax]]
:else[[px]]
\end

\function tf.convert.px.to.percentage(parentWidth,width) [<width>multiply[100]divide<parentWidth>]

\function tf.panel.value(stateTiddler,fallback) [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<fallback>]

\function tf.panel.flex(value) [[0 0 ]addsuffix<value>]

\function tf.panel.center.width()
[<leftCurrentWidth>addsuffix[ - ]addsuffix<rightCurrentWidth>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]]
\end

\function tf.panel.center.height()
[<topCurrentHeight>addsuffix[ - ]addsuffix<bottomCurrentHeight>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]]
\end

\procedure tf.panel-content(content)
\whitespace trim
<%if [<content>is[variable]] %>
	<$transclude $variable=<<content>> $mode="block"/>
<%elseif [<content>is[tiddler]] [<content>is[shadow]] %>
	<$transclude $tiddler=<<content>> $mode="block"/>
<% endif %>
\end

\procedure horizontal-split-panel(leftContent:"", rightContent:"", width:"50%", rightWidth:"", minHeight:"100%", minWidth:"5%", maxWidth:"95%", stateTiddler:"$:/state/hsplit/left", rightStateTiddler:"$:/state/hsplit/right", class:"", leftClass:"", rightClass:"", splitterClass:"")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	leftWidth={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<width>] }}}
	rightCurrentWidth={{{ [<rightStateTiddler>get[text]else<rightWidth>!is[blank]else<width>] }}}
	panelId=<<qualify>>
	data-panel-id-selector='[data-tf-panel-id="'
	data-panel-id-selector-close='"]'
	leftSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-left]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
	rightSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-right]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
>
	<div
		class={{{ tc-horizontal-split-panel [<class>] +[join[ ]] }}}
		style.display="flex"
		style.flex-direction="row"
		style.min-height=<<minHeight>>
		style.width="100%"
		style.max-width="100%"
		style.min-width="0"
		style.overflow="hidden"
	>
		<div
			data-tf-panel-id=<<panelId>>
			class={{{ tc-panel-left [<leftClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
			style.flex={{{ [tf.panel.flex<leftWidth>] }}}
			style.flex-basis=<<leftWidth>>
			style.width=<<leftWidth>>
			style.min-width=<<minWidth>>
			style.max-width=<<maxWidth>>
			style.overflow="auto"
		>
			<$transclude $variable="tf.panel-content" content=<<leftContent>>/>
		</div>

		<$resizer
			class={{{ tc-panel-splitter-vertical [<splitterClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
			direction="horizontal"
			mode="split-pair"
			leftSelector=<<leftSelector>>
			rightSelector=<<rightSelector>>
			leftTiddler=<<stateTiddler>>
			rightTiddler=<<rightStateTiddler>>
			leftField="text"
			rightField="text"
			min=<<minWidth>>
			max=<<maxWidth>>
			default=<<width>>
			unit={{{ [tf.get.value.metric<width>] }}}
			property="flexBasis"
			splitPairLiveResize="yes"
			splitPairSave="end"
		/>

		<div
			data-tf-panel-id=<<panelId>>
			class={{{ tc-panel-right [<rightClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
			style.flex={{{ [tf.panel.flex<rightCurrentWidth>] }}}
			style.flex-basis=<<rightCurrentWidth>>
			style.width=<<rightCurrentWidth>>
			style.min-width=<<minWidth>>
			style.max-width=<<maxWidth>>
			style.overflow="auto"
		>
			<$transclude $variable="tf.panel-content" content=<<rightContent>>/>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure vertical-split-panel(topContent:"", bottomContent:"", panelHeight:"75vh", height:"50%", bottomHeight:"", minHeight:"10%", maxHeight:"90%", stateTiddler:"$:/state/vsplit/top", bottomStateTiddler:"$:/state/vsplit/bottom", class:"", topClass:"", bottomClass:"", splitterClass:"")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	topHeight={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<height>] }}}
	bottomCurrentHeight={{{ [<bottomStateTiddler>get[text]else<bottomHeight>!is[blank]else<height>] }}}
	panelId=<<qualify>>
	data-panel-id-selector='[data-tf-panel-id="'
	data-panel-id-selector-close='"]'
	topSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-top]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
	bottomSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-bottom]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
>
<div
	class={{{ tc-vertical-split-panel [<class>] +[join[ ]] }}}
	style.display="flex"
	style.flex-direction="column"
	style.height=<<panelHeight>>
	style.width="100%"
	style.max-width="100%"
	style.min-width="0"
	style.min-height="0"
	style.overflow="hidden"
>
	<div
		data-tf-panel-id=<<panelId>>
		class={{{ tc-panel-top [<topClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
		style.flex={{{ [tf.panel.flex<topHeight>] }}}
		style.flex-basis=<<topHeight>>
		style.height=<<topHeight>>
		style.min-height=<<minHeight>>
		style.max-height=<<maxHeight>>
		style.overflow="auto"
	>
		<$transclude $variable="tf.panel-content" content=<<topContent>>/>
	</div>

	<$resizer
		class={{{ tc-panel-splitter-horizontal [<splitterClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
		direction="vertical"
		mode="split-pair"
		topSelector=<<topSelector>>
		bottomSelector=<<bottomSelector>>
		topTiddler=<<stateTiddler>>
		bottomTiddler=<<bottomStateTiddler>>
		topField="text"
		bottomField="text"
		min=<<minHeight>>
		max=<<maxHeight>>
		default=<<height>>
		unit={{{ [tf.get.value.metric<height>] }}}
		property="flexBasis"
		splitPairLiveResize="yes"
		splitPairSave="end"
	/>

	<div
		data-tf-panel-id=<<panelId>>
		class={{{ tc-panel-bottom [<bottomClass>] +[join[ ]] }}}
		style.flex={{{ [tf.panel.flex<bottomCurrentHeight>] }}}
		style.flex-basis=<<bottomCurrentHeight>>
		style.height=<<bottomCurrentHeight>>
		style.min-height=<<minHeight>>
		style.max-height=<<maxHeight>>
		style.overflow="auto"
	>
		<$transclude $variable="tf.panel-content" content=<<bottomContent>>/>
	</div>
</div>
</$let>
\end

\function tf.get-three-column-panels-left-max-width() [<rightStateTiddler>get[text]addsuffix[ - handleWidth - handleWidth - ]addsuffix<minWidth>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]] :else[<rightWidth>addsuffix[ - handleWidth - handleWidth - ]addsuffix<minWidth>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]]
\function tf.get-three-column-panels-right-max-width() [<leftStateTiddler>get[text]addsuffix[ - handleWidth - handleWidth - ]addsuffix<minWidth>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]] :else[<leftWidth>addsuffix[ - handleWidth - handleWidth - ]addsuffix<minWidth>addprefix[calc(100% - ]addsuffix[)]]

\procedure three-column-panels(leftContent:"", centerContent:"", rightContent:"", leftWidth:"10%", centerWidth:"", rightWidth:"10%", minWidth:"5%", maxWidth:"80%", minHeight:"100%", leftStateTiddler:"$:/state/three-col/left", centerStateTiddler:"$:/state/three-col/center", rightStateTiddler:"$:/state/three-col/right", class:"", leftClass:"", centerClass:"", rightClass:"", splitterClass:"")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	leftCurrentWidth={{{ [<leftStateTiddler>get[text]else<leftWidth>] }}}
	rightCurrentWidth={{{ [<rightStateTiddler>get[text]else<rightWidth>] }}}
	centerFallbackWidth={{{ [<centerWidth>!is[blank]else<tf.panel.center.width>] }}}
	centerCurrentWidth={{{ [<centerStateTiddler>get[text]else<centerFallbackWidth>] }}}
	panelId=<<qualify>>
	data-panel-id-selector='[data-tf-panel-id="'
	data-panel-id-selector-close='"]'
	leftSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-left]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
	centerSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-center]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
	rightSelector={{{ [[.tc-panel-right]addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector>addsuffix<panelId>addsuffix<data-panel-id-selector-close>] }}}
>
<div

\procedure btc.resizer.horizontal-split(statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/horizontal",leftSize:"40%",rightSize:"60%",min:"12rem",max:"85%",height:"24em",title:"Horizontal split pair",leftContent:"Left Pane",rightContent:"Right Pane")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	leftState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/left]] }}}
	rightState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/right]] }}}
>
	<div class="btc-resizer-demo-box">
		<div class="btc-resizer-demo-title"><<title>></div>
		<div class="btc-resizer-horizontal-split" style.min-height=<<height>>>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.width={{{ [<leftState>get[text]else<leftSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<leftState>get[text]else<leftSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="leftContent" $mode="block"/>

			</div>
			<$resizer
				class="btc-resizer-handle"
				direction="horizontal"
				mode="split-pair"
				element="previousSibling"
				unit="%"
				min=<<min>>
				max=<<max>>
				default=<<leftSize>>
				leftTiddler=<<leftState>>
				rightTiddler=<<rightState>>
				leftField="text"
				rightField="text"
				splitPairLiveResize="yes"
				splitPairSave="end"
				snap="20% 25% 33.333333% 40% 50% 60% 66.666667% 75% 80%"
				snapDistance="12px"
				snapHaptic="yes"
				cssVariable="--btc-horizontal-left"
				cssVariableSecondary="--btc-horizontal-right"
				cssVariableTarget="parent"
			/>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.width={{{ [<rightState>get[text]else<rightSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<rightState>get[text]else<rightSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="rightContent" $mode="block"/>

			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.resizer.vertical-split(statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/vertical",topSize:"55%",bottomSize:"45%",min:"6rem",max:"85%",height:"30em",title:"Vertical split pair",topContent:"Top pane",bottomContent:"Bottom pane")
\whitespace trim

	bottomState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/bottom]] }}}
>
	<div class="btc-resizer-demo-box">
		<div class="btc-resizer-demo-title"><<title>></div>
		<div class="btc-resizer-vertical-split" style.height=<<height>>>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.height={{{ [<topState>get[text]else<topSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<topState>get[text]else<topSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="topContent" $mode="block"/>

			</div>
			<$resizer
				class="btc-resizer-handle"
				direction="vertical"
				mode="split-pair"
				element="previousSibling"
				unit="%"
				min=<<min>>
				max=<<max>>
				default=<<topSize>>
				topTiddler=<<topState>>
				bottomTiddler=<<bottomState>>
				topField="text"
				bottomField="text"
				splitPairLiveResize="yes"
				splitPairSave="end"
				snap="20% 25% 33.333333% 50% 66.666667% 75% 80%"
				snapDistance="10px"
				cssVariable="--btc-vertical-top"
				cssVariableSecondary="--btc-vertical-bottom"
				cssVariableTarget="parent"
			/>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.height={{{ [<bottomState>get[text]else<bottomSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<bottomState>get[text]else<bottomSize>] }}}
			>
			
				<$transclude $variable="bottomContent" $mode="block"/>

			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.resizer.sidebar-workbench(sizeTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/sidebar-width",modeTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/sidebar-mode",indexTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/sidebar-preset-index",defaultSize:"20rem",min:"0px",max:"42rem",title:"Resizable sidebar workbench",sidebarContent:"Sidebar",mainContent:"Main area")
