\procedure btc.resizer.three-pane-workbench(statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/three-pane",leftSize:"18rem",rightSize:"24rem",title:"Three-pane workbench",leftContent:"Navigation",centerContent:"Editor",rightContent:"Inspector")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	leftState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/left]] }}}
	centerState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/center]] }}}
	rightState={{{ [<statePrefix>addsuffix[/right]] }}}
	centerSize={{{ [[calc(100% - ]addsuffix<leftSize>addsuffix[ - ]addsuffix<rightSize>addsuffix[)]] }}}
>
	<div class="btc-resizer-demo-box">
		<div class="btc-resizer-demo-title"><<title>></div>
		<div class="btc-resizer-three-pane" style.min-height="28em">
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.width={{{ [<leftState>get[text]else<leftSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<leftState>get[text]else<leftSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="leftContent" $mode="block"/>
			
			</div>
			<$resizer
				class="btc-resizer-handle"
				direction="horizontal"
				mode="split-pair"
				element="previousSibling"
				unit="rem"
				min="10rem"
				max="40rem"
				leftTiddler=<<leftState>>
				rightTiddler=<<centerState>>
				splitPairLiveResize="yes"
				splitPairSave="end"
				snap="12rem 16rem 20rem 24rem 32rem"
				snapDistance="10px"
				leftCssVariable="--btc-three-left-width"
				rightCssVariable="--btc-three-center-width"
				cssVariableTarget="parent"
			/>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.width={{{ [<centerState>get[text]else<centerSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<centerState>get[text]else<centerSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="centerContent" $mode="block"/>
			
			</div>
			<$resizer
				class="btc-resizer-handle"
				direction="horizontal"
				mode="split-pair"
				element="previousSibling"
				unit="rem"
				min="12rem"
				max="48rem"
				leftTiddler=<<centerState>>
				rightTiddler=<<rightState>>
				splitPairLiveResize="yes"
				splitPairSave="end"
				snap="16rem 20rem 24rem 28rem 36rem"
				snapDistance="10px"
				leftCssVariable="--btc-three-center-width"
				rightCssVariable="--btc-three-right-width"
				cssVariableTarget="parent"
			/>
			<div
				class="btc-resizer-flex-pane btc-resizer-pane"
				style.width={{{ [<rightState>get[text]else<rightSize>] }}}
				style.flex-basis={{{ [<rightState>get[text]else<rightSize>] }}}
			>

				<$transclude $variable="rightContent" $mode="block"/>
			
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.resizer.preset-panel(stateTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/preset-panel-width",modeTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/preset-panel-mode",indexTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/preset-panel-index",defaultSize:"22rem",title:"Preset-cycling panel",content:"Double-click the handle to cycle through closed, compact, normal, and wide.")
\whitespace trim
<div class="btc-resizer-demo-box">
	<div class="btc-resizer-demo-title"><<title>></div>
	<div style.display="flex" style.min-width="0" style.min-height="16em">
		<div
			class="btc-resizer-preset-card"
			style.flex-grow="0"
			style.flex-shrink="0"
			style.width={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<defaultSize>] }}}
			style.flex-basis={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<defaultSize>] }}}
		>

			<$transclude $variable="content" $mode="block"/>
		
			<p>Current preset: <$text text={{{ [<modeTiddler>get[text]else[normal]] }}}/></p>
			<p>Current size: <$text text={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<defaultSize>] }}}/></p>
		</div>
		<$resizer
			class="btc-resizer-handle"
			direction="horizontal"
			element="previousSibling"
			tiddler=<<stateTiddler>>
			field="text"
			unit="rem"
			min="0px"
			max="40rem"
			default=<<defaultSize>>
			live="yes"
			property="flexBasis"
			presetCycle="yes"
			presets="closed:0px;compact:14rem;normal:22rem;wide:34rem"
			presetTiddler=<<modeTiddler>>
			presetIndexTiddler=<<indexTiddler>>
			snap="0px 14rem 22rem 34rem"
			snapDistance="12px"
		/>
		<div class="btc-resizer-fill-pane btc-resizer-pane">
			This flexible area absorbs the remaining space.
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
\end

\procedure btc.resizer.cssvar-panel(stateTiddler:"$:/state/btc/resizer/examples/cssvar-panel-width",defaultSize:"22rem",title:"CSS variable publishing",content:"The resizer writes the size to a state tiddler and publishes it as `--btc-cssvar-panel-width`.")
\whitespace trim
<div class="btc-resizer-demo-box">
	<div class="btc-resizer-demo-title"><<title>></div>
	<div style.display="flex" style.min-width="0" style.align-items="stretch">
		<div
			class="btc-resizer-cssvar-demo"
			style.--btc-cssvar-panel-width={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<defaultSize>] }}}
		>

			<$transclude $variable="content" $mode="block"/>

			<p>Width tiddler: `<$text text=<<stateTiddler>>/>`</p>
			<p>Current value: <$text text={{{ [<stateTiddler>get[text]else<defaultSize>] }}}/></p>
		</div>
		<$resizer
			class="btc-resizer-handle"
			direction="horizontal"
			element="previousSibling"
			tiddler=<<stateTiddler>>
			field="text"
			unit="rem"
			min="12rem"
			max="42rem"
			default=<<defaultSize>>
			live="yes"
			property="width"
			cssVariable="--btc-cssvar-panel-width"
			cssVariableTarget="target"
			snap="12rem 18rem 22rem 28rem 34rem 42rem"
			snapDistance="10px"
		/>
		<div class="btc-resizer-fill-pane btc-resizer-pane">
			The neighboring pane does not need to know the width directly.
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
\end

\function btc.rgrid.track.default-col-size(columns)
	[[100]divide<columns>fixed[6]addsuffix[%]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.track.template(columns,defaultColSize,colMinWidth)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[[minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-col-min-width, ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[), var(--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix<currentTiddler>addsuffix[, ]addsuffix<defaultColSize>addsuffix[))]]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.track.variable(statePrefix,index,columns,defaultColSize,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[<statePrefix>addsuffix[/col-]addsuffix<index>get[text]]
	~[<fillLastColumn>match[yes]then<index>compare:integer:eq<columns>then<lastColSize>]
	~[<defaultColSize>]
	+[addprefix[: ]addprefix<index>addprefix[--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix[;]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.track.variables(statePrefix,columns,defaultColSize,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[function[btc.rgrid.track.variable],<statePrefix>,<currentTiddler>,<columns>,<defaultColSize>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.track.table(gridId:"default",columns:"4",statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/resizer/rgrid/default",defaultColSize:"",fillLastColumn:"yes",lastColSize:"1fr",colMinWidth:"0",minColSize:"4%",maxColSize:"90%",unit:"%",gap:"0.25rem",rowMinHeight:"3rem",class:"",content:"")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	effectiveDefaultColSize={{{ [<defaultColSize>!is[blank]then<defaultColSize>] ~[function[btc.rgrid.track.default-col-size],<columns>] }}}
	btcRgridGridId=<<gridId>>
	btcRgridColumns=<<columns>>
	btcRgridStatePrefix=<<statePrefix>>
	btcRgridDefaultColSize=<<effectiveDefaultColSize>>
	btcRgridColMinWidth=<<colMinWidth>>
	btcRgridMinColSize=<<minColSize>>
	btcRgridMaxColSize=<<maxColSize>>
	btcRgridUnit=<<unit>>
	btcRgridSelector={{{ [[.btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>] }}}
	btcRgridColumnTemplate={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.track.template],<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<colMinWidth>] }}}
	btcRgridColumnVariables={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.track.variables],<statePrefix>,<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>] }}}
	btcRgridStyle={{{ [[--btc-rgrid-columns-template: ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnTemplate>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-col-min-width: ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-gap: ]addsuffix<gap>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-row-min-height: ]addsuffix<rowMinHeight>addsuffix[; ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnVariables>] }}}
>
	<div
		class={{{ [[btc-rgrid-table btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>addsuffix[ ]addsuffix<class>] }}}
		style=<<btcRgridStyle>>
		data-btc-rgrid-id=<<gridId>>
	>
		<div class="btc-rgrid-content">
			<$transclude $variable="content"/>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.track.cell(col:"auto",row:"auto",colSpan:"1",rowSpan:"1",last:"no",resize:"yes",class:"",title:"",content:"",cellPadding:"")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	boundaryIndex={{{ [<col>match[auto]then[]] ~[<col>add<colSpan>subtract[1]] }}}
	effectiveCellPadding={{{ [<cellPadding>!is[blank]!match[default]then<cellPadding>] }}}
>
	<div
		class={{{ [[btc-rgrid-cell ]addsuffix<class>] }}}
		data-col=<<col>>
		data-row=<<row>>
		data-col-span=<<colSpan>>
		data-row-span=<<rowSpan>>
		style.grid-column={{{ [<col>addsuffix[ / span ]addsuffix<colSpan>] }}}
		style.grid-row={{{ [<row>addsuffix[ / span ]addsuffix<rowSpan>] }}}
		style.--btc-rgrid-cell-padding=<<effectiveCellPadding>>
	>
		<div class="btc-rgrid-cell-content">
			<$list filter="[<title>!is[blank]]">
				<div class="btc-rgrid-cell-title"><<title>></div>
			</$list>
			<$transclude $variable="content" $mode="block"/>
		</div>
		<$list filter="[<resize>match[yes]]">
			<$list filter="[<last>!match[yes]]">
				<$list filter="[<boundaryIndex>!is[blank]]">
					<$transclude $variable="btc.rgrid.track.handle" index=<<boundaryIndex>>/>
				</$list>
			</$list>
		</$list>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.track.header(col:"auto",row:"auto",colSpan:"1",rowSpan:"1",last:"no",resize:"yes",class:"",content:"",cellPadding:"")
\whitespace trim
<$transclude
	$variable="btc.rgrid.track.cell"
	col=<<col>>
	row=<<row>>
	colSpan=<<colSpan>>
	rowSpan=<<rowSpan>>
	last=<<last>>
	resize=<<resize>>
	class={{{ [[btc-rgrid-cell-header ]addsuffix<class>] }}}
	content=<<content>>
	cellPadding=<<cellPadding>>
/>
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.track.handle(index:"1")
\whitespace trim
<$resizer
	mode="grid-track"
	class="btc-rgrid-cell-resizer"
	direction="horizontal"
	gridSelector=<<btcRgridSelector>>
	gridTrackAxis="column"
	gridTrackIndex=<<index>>
	gridTrackStatePrefix=<<btcRgridStatePrefix>>
	gridTrackUnit=<<btcRgridUnit>>
	gridTrackMin=<<btcRgridMinColSize>>
	gridTrackMax=<<btcRgridMaxColSize>>
	gridTrackLive="yes"
	gridTrackSave="end"
	gridTrackLiveUnit="px"
	gridTrackSaveUnit="px"
	gridTrackFreezeOnStart="yes"
	gridTrackFreezeOnEnd="yes"
/>
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.default-col-size(columns)
	[[100]divide<columns>fixed[6]addsuffix[%]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.columns-template(columns,defaultColSize,colMinWidth)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[[minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-col-min-width, ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[), var(--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix<currentTiddler>addsuffix[, ]addsuffix<defaultColSize>addsuffix[))]]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.column-variable(statePrefix,index,columns,defaultColSize,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[<statePrefix>addsuffix[/col-]addsuffix<index>get[text]]
	~[<fillLastColumn>match[yes]then<index>compare:integer:eq<columns>then<lastColSize>]
	~[<defaultColSize>]
	+[addprefix[: ]addprefix<index>addprefix[--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix[;]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.column-variables(statePrefix,columns,defaultColSize,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[function[btc.rgrid.placed.column-variable],<statePrefix>,<currentTiddler>,<columns>,<defaultColSize>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.rows-template(rows,defaultRowSize)
	[range[1],<rows>]
	:map[[minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-row-min-height), ]addsuffix<defaultRowSize>addsuffix[)]]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.cell-padding-default(defaults,index,fallback)
	[<defaults>split[;]nth<index>trim[]!is[blank]!match[default]]
	~[<fallback>]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.cell-padding-index(row,col,columns)
	[<row>subtract[1]multiply<columns>add<col>]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.row-start()
	[{!!row}trim[]else[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.col-start()
	[{!!col}trim[]else[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.row-span()
	[{!!rowspan}trim[]else[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.col-span()
	[{!!colspan}trim[]else[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.row-end()
	[{!!rowspan}trim[]else[1]add{!!row}subtract[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.col-end()
	[{!!colspan}trim[]else[1]add{!!col}subtract[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.cells(cellFilter)
	[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]]
	:filter[{!!row}trim[]!is[blank]]
	:filter[{!!col}trim[]!is[blank]]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.row-start]compare:integer:gt[0]]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.col-start]compare:integer:gt[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.occupied(cellFilter,row,col)
	[function[btc.rgrid.placed.cells],<cellFilter>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.row-start]compare:integer:lteq<row>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.col-start]compare:integer:lteq<col>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.row-end]compare:integer:gteq<row>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.placed.col-end]compare:integer:gteq<col>]
	+[limit[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.placed.free(cellFilter,row,col)
	[function[btc.rgrid.placed.occupied],<cellFilter>,<row>,<col>count[]match[0]then[yes]]
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.placed.table(gridId:"placed-default",cellFilter:"[tag[TableCell]]",columns:"4",rows:"4",statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/rgrid/placed/default",defaultColSize:"",defaultRowSize:"auto",fillLastColumn:"yes",lastColSize:"1fr",colMinWidth:"0",rowMinHeight:"3rem",cellGap:"0.35rem",defaultCellPadding:"0.75em 0.95em",cellPaddingDefaults:"",cellPaddingField:"padding",defaultCellMode:"block",cellModeField:"cellmode",minColSize:"4%",maxColSize:"90%",unit:"%",class:"",sortField:"order",showTitles:"no")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	effectiveDefaultColSize={{{ [<defaultColSize>!is[blank]then<defaultColSize>] ~[function[btc.rgrid.placed.default-col-size],<columns>] }}}
	btcRgridGridId=<<gridId>>
	btcRgridColumns=<<columns>>
	btcRgridStatePrefix=<<statePrefix>>
	btcRgridDefaultColSize=<<effectiveDefaultColSize>>
	btcRgridColMinWidth=<<colMinWidth>>
	btcRgridDefaultCellPadding=<<defaultCellPadding>>
	btcRgridCellPaddingDefaults=<<cellPaddingDefaults>>
	btcRgridCellPaddingField=<<cellPaddingField>>
	btcRgridDefaultCellMode=<<defaultCellMode>>
	btcRgridCellModeField=<<cellModeField>>
	btcRgridMinColSize=<<minColSize>>
	btcRgridMaxColSize=<<maxColSize>>
	btcRgridUnit=<<unit>>
	btcRgridSelector={{{ [[.btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>] }}}
	btcRgridColumnTemplate={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.placed.columns-template],<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<colMinWidth>] }}}
	btcRgridColumnVariables={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.placed.column-variables],<statePrefix>,<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>] }}}
	btcRgridRowsTemplate={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.placed.rows-template],<rows>,<defaultRowSize>] }}}
	btcRgridStyle={{{ [[--btc-rgrid-columns-template: ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnTemplate>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-col-min-width: ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-rows-template: ]addsuffix<btcRgridRowsTemplate>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-row-min-height: ]addsuffix<rowMinHeight>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-cell-gap: ]addsuffix<cellGap>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-cell-padding: ]addsuffix<defaultCellPadding>addsuffix[; ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnVariables>] }}}
>
	<div
		class={{{ [[btc-rgrid-table btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>addsuffix[ ]addsuffix<class>] }}}
		style=<<btcRgridStyle>>
		data-btc-rgrid-id=<<gridId>>
		data-columns=<<columns>>
		data-rows=<<rows>>
		data-resize-columns="yes"
	>
		<div class="btc-rgrid-content">
			<$list filter="[range[1],<rows>]">
				<$let ghostRow=<<currentTiddler>>>
					<$list filter="[range[1],<columns>]">
						<$let ghostCol=<<currentTiddler>>>
							<%if [function[btc.rgrid.placed.free],<cellFilter>,<ghostRow>,<ghostCol>] %>
								<$transclude
									$variable="btc.rgrid.placed.ghost"
									row=<<ghostRow>>
									col=<<ghostCol>>
								/>
							<% endif %>
						</$let>
					</$list>
				</$let>
			</$list>

			<$list filter="[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]sortan<sortField>]">
				<$transclude
					$variable="btc.rgrid.placed.cell"
					tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>
					showTitle=<<showTitles>>
				/>
			</$list>

			<$list filter="[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]sortan<sortField>]">
				<$transclude
					$variable="btc.rgrid.placed.cell-overlay-handles"
					tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>
				/>
			</$list>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.placed.ghost(row:"1",col:"1")
\whitespace trim
<$let
	boundaryIndex=<<col>>
	isLastColumn={{{ [<col>compare:integer:gteq<btcRgridColumns>then[yes]else[no]] }}}
>
	<div
		class="btc-rgrid-cell btc-rgrid-cell-ghost"
		data-ghost="yes"
		data-row=<<row>>
		data-col=<<col>>
		data-boundary-index=<<boundaryIndex>>
		style.grid-area={{{ [<row>addsuffix[ / ]addsuffix<col>addsuffix[ / span 1 / span 1]] }}}
	>
		<div class="btc-rgrid-cell-content"></div>
	</div>

\function btc.rgrid.xy.default-col-size(columns)
	[[100]divide<columns>fixed[6]addsuffix[%]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.default-row-size(rows)
	[[100]divide<rows>fixed[6]addsuffix[%]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.columns-template(columns,defaultColSize,colMinWidth)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[[minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-col-min-width, ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[), var(--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix<currentTiddler>addsuffix[, ]addsuffix<defaultColSize>addsuffix[))]]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.rows-template(rows,defaultRowSize)
	[range[1],<rows>]
	:map[[minmax(var(--btc-rgrid-row-min-height), var(--btc-rgrid-row-]addsuffix<currentTiddler>addsuffix[, ]addsuffix<defaultRowSize>addsuffix[))]]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.track-default(defaults,index)
	[<defaults>split[ ]nth<index>trim[]!is[blank]!match[default]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.cell-padding-default(defaults,index,fallback)
	[<defaults>split[;]nth<index>trim[]!is[blank]!match[default]]
	~[<fallback>]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.cell-padding-index(row,col,columns)
	[<row>subtract[1]multiply<columns>add<col>]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.column-variable(statePrefix,index,columns,defaultColSize,colDefaults,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[<statePrefix>addsuffix[/col-]addsuffix<index>get[text]]
	~[function[btc.rgrid.xy.track-default],<colDefaults>,<index>]
	~[<fillLastColumn>match[yes]then<index>compare:integer:eq<columns>then<lastColSize>]
	~[<defaultColSize>]
	+[addprefix[: ]addprefix<index>addprefix[--btc-rgrid-col-]addsuffix[;]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.row-variable(statePrefix,index,rows,defaultRowSize,rowDefaults,fillLastRow,lastRowSize)
	[<statePrefix>addsuffix[/row-]addsuffix<index>get[text]]
	~[function[btc.rgrid.xy.track-default],<rowDefaults>,<index>]
	~[<fillLastRow>match[yes]then<index>compare:integer:eq<rows>then<lastRowSize>]
	~[<defaultRowSize>]
	+[addprefix[: ]addprefix<index>addprefix[--btc-rgrid-row-]addsuffix[;]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.column-variables(statePrefix,columns,defaultColSize,colDefaults,fillLastColumn,lastColSize)
	[range[1],<columns>]
	:map[function[btc.rgrid.xy.column-variable],<statePrefix>,<currentTiddler>,<columns>,<defaultColSize>,<colDefaults>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.row-variables(statePrefix,rows,defaultRowSize,rowDefaults,fillLastRow,lastRowSize)
	[range[1],<rows>]
	:map[function[btc.rgrid.xy.row-variable],<statePrefix>,<currentTiddler>,<rows>,<defaultRowSize>,<rowDefaults>,<fillLastRow>,<lastRowSize>]
	+[join[ ]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.row-start()
	[{!!row}trim[]else[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.col-start()
	[{!!col}trim[]else[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.row-span()
	[{!!rowspan}trim[]else[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.col-span()
	[{!!colspan}trim[]else[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.row-end()
	[{!!rowspan}trim[]else[1]add{!!row}subtract[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.col-end()
	[{!!colspan}trim[]else[1]add{!!col}subtract[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.cells(cellFilter)
	[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]]
	:filter[{!!row}trim[]!is[blank]]
	:filter[{!!col}trim[]!is[blank]]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.row-start]compare:integer:gt[0]]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.col-start]compare:integer:gt[0]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.occupied(cellFilter,row,col)
	[function[btc.rgrid.xy.cells],<cellFilter>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.row-start]compare:integer:lteq<row>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.col-start]compare:integer:lteq<col>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.row-end]compare:integer:gteq<row>]
	:filter[function[btc.rgrid.xy.col-end]compare:integer:gteq<col>]
	+[limit[1]]
\end

\function btc.rgrid.xy.free(cellFilter,row,col)
	[function[btc.rgrid.xy.occupied],<cellFilter>,<row>,<col>count[]match[0]then[yes]]
\end

\procedure btc.rgrid.xy.table(
	gridId:"xy-default",
	cellFilter:"[tag[TableCell]]",
	columns:"4",
	rows:"4",
	statePrefix:"$:/state/btc/rgrid/xy/default",
	defaultColSize:"",
	defaultRowSize:"",
	colDefaults:"",
	rowDefaults:"",
	fillLastColumn:"yes",
	lastColSize:"1fr",
	colMinWidth:"0",
	fillLastRow:"yes",
	lastRowSize:"1fr",
	defaultCellPadding:"0.75em 0.95em",
	cellPaddingDefaults:"",
	cellPaddingField:"padding",
	defaultCellMode:"block",
	cellModeField:"cellmode",
	rowMinHeight:"3rem",
	cellGap:"0.35rem",
	height:"32rem",
	resizeColumns:"yes",
	resizeRows:"yes",
	minColSize:"4%",
	maxColSize:"90%",
	minRowSize:"2rem",
	maxRowSize:"80%",
	colUnit:"%",
	rowUnit:"px",
	class:"",
	sortField:"order",
	showTitles:"no"
)
\whitespace trim
<$let
	effectiveDefaultColSize={{{ [<defaultColSize>!is[blank]then<defaultColSize>] ~[function[btc.rgrid.xy.default-col-size],<columns>] }}}
	effectiveDefaultRowSize={{{ [<defaultRowSize>!is[blank]then<defaultRowSize>] ~[function[btc.rgrid.xy.default-row-size],<rows>] }}}

	btcRgridGridId=<<gridId>>
	btcRgridColumns=<<columns>>
	btcRgridRows=<<rows>>
	btcRgridStatePrefix=<<statePrefix>>

	btcRgridResizeColumns=<<resizeColumns>>
	btcRgridResizeRows=<<resizeRows>>

	btcRgridDefaultColSize=<<effectiveDefaultColSize>>
	btcRgridDefaultRowSize=<<effectiveDefaultRowSize>>
	btcRgridColMinWidth=<<colMinWidth>>
	btcRgridDefaultCellPadding=<<defaultCellPadding>>
	btcRgridCellPaddingDefaults=<<cellPaddingDefaults>>
	btcRgridCellPaddingField=<<cellPaddingField>>
	btcRgridDefaultCellMode=<<defaultCellMode>>
	btcRgridCellModeField=<<cellModeField>>

	btcRgridMinColSize=<<minColSize>>
	btcRgridMaxColSize=<<maxColSize>>
	btcRgridMinRowSize=<<minRowSize>>
	btcRgridMaxRowSize=<<maxRowSize>>

	btcRgridColUnit=<<colUnit>>
	btcRgridRowUnit=<<rowUnit>>

	btcRgridSelector={{{ [[.btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>] }}}

	btcRgridColumnTemplate={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.xy.columns-template],<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<colMinWidth>] }}}
	btcRgridRowsTemplate={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.xy.rows-template],<rows>,<effectiveDefaultRowSize>] }}}

	btcRgridColumnVariables={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.xy.column-variables],<statePrefix>,<columns>,<effectiveDefaultColSize>,<colDefaults>,<fillLastColumn>,<lastColSize>] }}}
	btcRgridRowVariables={{{ [function[btc.rgrid.xy.row-variables],<statePrefix>,<rows>,<effectiveDefaultRowSize>,<rowDefaults>,<fillLastRow>,<lastRowSize>] }}}

	btcRgridStyle={{{ [[--btc-rgrid-columns-template: ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnTemplate>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-col-min-width: ]addsuffix<colMinWidth>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-rows-template: ]addsuffix<btcRgridRowsTemplate>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-row-min-height: ]addsuffix<rowMinHeight>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-cell-gap: ]addsuffix<cellGap>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-height: ]addsuffix<height>addsuffix[; --btc-rgrid-cell-padding: ]addsuffix<defaultCellPadding>addsuffix[; ]addsuffix<btcRgridColumnVariables>addsuffix[ ]addsuffix<btcRgridRowVariables>] }}}
>
	<div
		class={{{ [[btc-rgrid-table btc-rgrid-instance-]addsuffix<gridId>addsuffix[ ]addsuffix<class>] }}}
		style=<<btcRgridStyle>>
		data-btc-rgrid-id=<<gridId>>
		data-columns=<<columns>>
		data-rows=<<rows>>
		data-resize-columns=<<resizeColumns>>
		data-resize-rows=<<resizeRows>>
	>
		<div class="btc-rgrid-content">
			<$list filter="[range[1],<rows>]">
				<$let ghostRow=<<currentTiddler>>>
					<$list filter="[range[1],<columns>]">
						<$let ghostCol=<<currentTiddler>>>
							<%if [function[btc.rgrid.xy.free],<cellFilter>,<ghostRow>,<ghostCol>] %>
								<$transclude
									$variable="btc.rgrid.xy.ghost"
									row=<<ghostRow>>
									col=<<ghostCol>>
								/>
							<% endif %>
						</$let>
					</$list>
				</$let>
			</$list>

			<$list filter="[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]sortan<sortField>]">
				<$transclude
					$variable="btc.rgrid.xy.cell"
					tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>
					showTitle=<<showTitles>>
				/>
			</$list>

			<$list filter="[subfilter<cellFilter>!is[draft]sortan<sortField>]">
				<$transclude
					$variable="btc.rgrid.xy.cell-overlay-handles"
					tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>
				/>
			</$list>
		</div>
	</div>
</$let>
\end
